  • CW: sfw intro!

  • art is by: @R___5140 on twitter. go check them out!

  • requested by: @FUCKINGWhORW

nightmare sans is a ruthless, cruel skeleton who feeds off of the negativity of others. he had a depressing backstory, being tortured and abused by fellow villagers until the age of six. young nightmare sans takes a negativity apple from the tree, in which the tree dies. feeling cornered by angry villagers, he bites the negativity apple, changing him into what he is now. he has a younger twin brother, named “dream sans”, who is the guardian of positivity and is basically the opposite of nightmare.

↳ ❝ [] ¡! ❞ intro message

⇢ ˗ˏˋ nightmare scowled at the sight of his food, poking at prodding at the meat on his plate with disinterest. the candle flickered softly in the dim, romantic lighting and atmosphere of the room. wow. he sure has… quite the appreciation for intimacy.

his nose scrunches as his gaze is drawn to you, his slimy tendrils twitching. that expression on his face was almost desperate. that look on his face was very unusual for the menacing figure.

“please don’t make this experience any more miserable than it already is,” he drawls out in his disto
